programmes.show_description: First-class comedy and variety with one of Britain's finest double acts, Ronnies Barker and Corbett. The sketches include Cafe Hold Up, Money, Allotment, and Clock Shop.
Featuring the Swear Box sketch. Vintage laughs from the bespectacled comedy greats. Other humorous highlights include: Minister of Poetry, The Bank and Doctor's Orders.
More witty wordplay and perfect parody with Barker, Corbett, and guest Diana Dors. Sketches include: Gummidges Greetings Cards, A Further Diet of Worms, and The Worm That Turned.
Featuring the Confusing Shopping List sketch. More chucklesome skits courtesy of the bespectacled Rons, including Minister of Intelligence, Welcome Home and Rochdale Ringers.
First-class comedy and variety with one of Britain's finest double acts, Ronnies Barker and Corbett. The sketches include Cafe Hold Up, Money, Allotment, and Clock Shop.
Featuring the Swear Box sketch. Vintage laughs from the bespectacled comedy greats. Other humorous highlights include: Minister of Poetry, The Bank and Doctor's Orders.
Botallack: Ben Robinson discovers how the Cornish village of Botallack was the centre of the Cornish tin and copper mining industry and supplied a deadly poison to the world.
Shopping from Home.
A woman plunges 10ft through the floorboards of her Sheffield home in a freak accident, and the HART team launch a major rescue operation to save her.
There's a major rescue operation on the M1 after a car towing a caravan rolls over and hits a lamp post - trapping the driver. A teacher out on his mountain bike suffers a brain injury.
The team helps a biker critically injured in a crash, and a man vanishes after going for a swim in a Pennines lake, sparking a major rescue operation.

Duran Duran Special: Boys with incredible '80s hair on film. Mark Radcliffe looks back at classic Duran Duran performances on TOTP, including Rio, Hungry Like the Wolf and The Reflex.
Wham! Special: Following George Michael's passing in 2016, this is an all-too-poignant medley of Wham! hits from the BBC vaults. Stay tuned for Bad Boys, Club Tropicana, Freedom and many more.
04/12/98: Featuring Boyzone, All Saints, Vonda Shepard, Faithless and Madonna. Kate Thornton presents.
05/02/99: Featuring Bryan Adams & Melanie C, Garbage, Inner City, The Divine Comedy and Leilani. Jamie Theakston presents.
05/03/99: Featuring Blur, Cher, The Cardigans, Whitney Houston and Stereophonics. Jamie Theakston presents.
06/11/98: Featuring Alanis Morissette, Billie, Aerosmith, Touch & Go and Pras. Kate Thornton presents.

Shopping from Home.
A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.
A hitman linked to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water.
It's a race against time to dig out a man buried under three tonnes of soil, and the team are called to rescue the victims of a major crash involving a taxi.
A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.

A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.
A hitman linked to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water.
After escaping and being recaptured by Draconians, the Doctor convinces the Draconian prince of the Ogron involvement just as the true manipulator is revealed.
The Master captures the Doctor and Jo and takes them to the Ogron planet to show off his alliance with the Daleks, who plan to exploit the coming interplanetary war.
The Doctor and Jo escape the Master and the Daleks, warn both Earth and Draconia of the real threat, and set off in pursuit of the Daleks to stop their larger invasion plan.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: After the Doctor collapses from injuries sustained on Spiridon, Jo seeks help from a group of Thals who reveal the Daleks are secretly forming an invasion force on the planet.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: The Doctor, revived by the Thals, discovers that the Daleks are experimenting with invisibility and preparing to unleash a deadly bacterial weapon.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: Jo evades capture while the Doctor and the Thals infiltrate a Dalek base, learning of a vast Dalek army hidden in suspended animation.
